prompt: Create an ultra-photorealistic cinematic close-up portrait using the uploaded image as the reference. Preserve the subject's exact facial identity without altering the face, expression, age, facial structure, hairstyle, beard shape, beard density, skin tone, pores, wrinkles, fine facial hair, and all natural skin imperfections. Maintain the authentic facial proportions and realistic texture. Add elegant, thin round gold-framed glasses with vivid translucent orange reflective lenses, ensuring the eyes remain razor-sharp and clearly visible through the reflections. Render physically accurate lens reflections, subtle refractions, metallic gold highlights, and realistic glass transparency. Illuminate the portrait with dramatic neon blue rim lighting from the left and fiery red rim lighting from the right, creating a striking cyberpunk cinematic atmosphere against a pure deep black background. Use premium cinematic HDR lighting with smooth color separation, realistic falloff, and high contrast. Capture every skin pore, wrinkle, beard strand, eyebrow hair, eyelash, and individual hair fiber in extraordinary detail. Produce realistic skin micro-texture, natural subsurface scattering, glossy lips, detailed eyes, and lifelike facial contours. Style as luxury editorial fashion photography, featuring ultra-shallow depth of field, razor-sharp focus on the eyes and glasses, creamy background bokeh, exceptional dynamic range, crisp metallic highlights, and premium color grading. Award-winning futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic, uncompromising 8K photorealism, hyper-realistic rendering, cinematic composition, masterpiece quality, highly detailed, ultra-realistic, HDR, DSLR, medium-format camera quality, studio lighting, realistic reflections, premium retouching, professional color science. Aspect Ratio: 3:4

promptZh: 使用上传的图像作为参考，创作一张超写实电影级特写肖像。在不改变面部、表情、年龄、面部结构、发型、胡须形状、胡须密度、肤色、毛孔、皱纹、细小面部绒毛以及所有自然皮肤瑕疵的前提下，精准保留主体原有的面部特征。保持真实的面部比例和逼真的纹理。添加优雅、纤细的 金色 边框眼镜，镜片为鲜艳的半透明 橙色 反光镜片，确保双眼依然清晰可见且锐利。渲染物理上精确的镜片反射、微妙的折射、金属质感的金色高光以及逼真的玻璃透明度。为肖像添加戏剧性的霓虹灯光效果：左侧为 蓝色 轮廓光，右侧为炽热的红色轮廓光，在纯深黑色背景下营造出震撼的赛博朋克电影氛围。使用顶级电影级 HDR 灯光，实现平滑的色彩分离、逼真的光影衰减和高对比度。以非凡的细节捕捉每一个皮肤毛孔、皱纹、胡须、眉毛、睫毛和发丝。呈现逼真的皮肤微纹理、自然的次表面散射、光泽双唇、精致眼部和栩栩如生的面部轮廓。风格定位为奢华时尚摄影，采用极浅的景深，焦点锐利地聚焦于眼睛和眼镜，背景呈现奶油般的虚化效果，具备卓越的动态范围、清脆的金属高光和高级的调色。屡获殊荣的未来赛博朋克美学，不妥协的 8K 超写实画质，超逼真渲染，电影级构图，大师级品质，高度细节化，超写实，HDR，DSLR，中画幅相机品质，影棚灯光，逼真反射，高级修图，专业色彩科学。长宽比：3:4
